title: Asbo
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Asbo1.jpg|thumb|right|250px|''Asbo 1'' fleeing from Imperial Gunboats.]]
'''''Asbo''''' was a group of three [[Modular conveyor]]s used by the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] during the [[Sepan Civil War]].

[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, lead by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] encountered these transports as [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] staged a raid on the Ripoblus supply convoy. Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] intervened, running off the Dimok attackers, only to discover illegal cargo, as the Dimoks had claimed to the Imperials onboard the Modular Conveyors, one of them in fact contained Imperial war supplies.

Imperial [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|Stormtrooper Transports]] ''[[Epsilon group]]'', despite threaten by [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|Escort shuttles]] ''[[Ayalam]]'', ''[[Yawnor]]'' and ''[[Noerbo]] '', subsequently captured group ''Asbo'' and impounded them despite Ripoblus attempts to stop them.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:%C3%85sbo|Åsbo]] is the name of two regions in [[Wikipedia:Sweden|Sweden]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
